jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Khadim's
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
